comment: Curated catalog of public DNS blocklist sources. Snapshot derived from AdGuard's HostlistsRegistry (https://github.com/AdguardTeam/HostlistsRegistry, MIT) plus the most-cited Pi-hole defaults and Hagezi / OISD entries. Each source's own license is recorded per entry. Move in lockstep with releases — operators can also subscribe to ad-hoc URLs alongside catalog entries.

sources.name: AdGuard DNS Filter
sources.description: AdGuard's own filter list, balanced for general ad/tracker blocking with low breakage.

sources.name: StevenBlack Unified Hosts
sources.description: Consolidated hosts file aggregating ad / malware / fakenews sources. The default Pi-hole adlist.

sources.name: OISD Small
sources.description: OISD basic — a curated low-breakage block list focused on ads and trackers.

sources.name: OISD Big
sources.description: OISD extended — broader ad / tracker / malware coverage. Higher breakage risk than OISD Small.

sources.name: Hagezi Pro
sources.description: Hagezi's flagship Pro list — well-maintained, broadly compatible, focused on ads / tracking / privacy.

sources.name: Hagezi Pro Plus
sources.description: Hagezi Pro+ — Pro list plus tightened tracking / telemetry. Higher breakage than Pro.

sources.name: 1Hosts (Lite)
sources.description: Minimalist ad / tracker list. Lower breakage than 1Hosts Pro.

sources.name: Phishing Army (Extended)
sources.description: Daily-updated phishing-domain blocklist. Pairs well with a general ad list.

sources.name: DigitalSide Threat-Intel
sources.description: OSINT-curated malware / threat-intel domain feed maintained by DigitalSide.

sources.name: EasyPrivacy
sources.description: Tracking and analytics domains — widely used by browser ad-blockers.

sources.name: StevenBlack Fakenews Add-on
sources.description: Fake-news / clickbait / disinformation domain extension to StevenBlack hosts.

sources.name: StevenBlack Adult Add-on
sources.description: Adult-content domain extension to StevenBlack hosts.
